---
title: "Website"
author: "Margherita"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 200px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 400px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    theme:
      light: minty
      dark: superhero
self-contained: true 
lang: it
---

# Presentation

This is Margherita's website

## Sub presentation

Sub section

### Sub sub section

Another sub sub sub section

#### My paragraph

This is a paragraph
